title: crepidium distans
intro: Crepidium distans, also known as the Spiranthes distans, is a species of orchid native to the Americas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepidium distans are attributed to its ability to treat a variety of conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Traditional herbal preparations of Crepidium distans include infusions and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
